post.summary: Delete User Data (GDPR Article 17 - Right to Erasure)
post.description: COMPLIANCE IMPLEMENTATION: GDPR Article 17: Right to Erasure (Right to be Forgotten) - Allows users to request deletion of personal data. CCPA Section 1798.105: Right to Delete - Enables consumers to request deletion of personal information. Valkyr Labs Privacy Policy (2024-10-07): Section 6 - Data Subject Rights. Valkyr Labs Terms of Service (2024-10-07): Data retention and deletion policies. DELETION OPTIONS: HARD_DELETE (permanent GDPR-compliant deletion), SOFT_DELETE (disable account, retain for legal/audit), ANONYMIZE (remove PII but keep anonymized data for analytics - RECOMMENDED). SECURITY: Requires authentication. Users can only delete their own data. LEGAL COMPLIANCE: Balances right to erasure with legitimate business interests and legal retention requirements.

parameters.name: deletionType
parameters.description: Type of deletion to perform: HARD_DELETE (permanent), SOFT_DELETE (disable account), ANONYMIZE (remove PII, keep analytics data)

500.description: Internal server error - Data deletion failed

get.summary: Get Data Summary (GDPR Article 15 - Right of Access)
get.description: COMPLIANCE IMPLEMENTATION: GDPR Article 15: Right of Access - Provides information about personal data processing. CCPA Section 1798.100: Right to Know - Informs consumers about personal information collection and use. Valkyr Labs Privacy Policy (2024-10-07): Section 6 - Data Subject Rights. Valkyr Labs DPA: Data Processing Agreement transparency requirements. SUMMARY INCLUDES: User profile status, owned objects count, permissions count, data retention timeline, last activity. SECURITY: Requires authentication. Users can only access their own data summary. PURPOSE: Enables users to understand what data is held and how it's processed.

500.description: Internal server error - Data summary failed

schema.description: Summary of user data and processing activities

get.summary: Export User Data (GDPR Article 20 - Right to Data Portability)
get.description: COMPLIANCE IMPLEMENTATION: GDPR Article 20: Right to Data Portability - Provides user data in structured, machine-readable format. CCPA Section 1798.110: Right to Know - Discloses personal information collected about consumer. Valkyr Labs Privacy Policy (2024-10-07): Section 6 - Data Subject Rights. Valkyr Labs DPA: Data Processing Agreement compliance for data export. EXPORTED DATA INCLUDES: User profile information, all owned objects, ACL permissions, recent activity. SECURITY: Requires authentication. Users can only export their own data. FORMAT: JSON file download with timestamp. RETENTION: Export includes data subject to 5-year retention policy per Terms of Service.

500.description: Internal server error - Data export failed

200.description: Data export successful - JSON file download

schema.description: JSON export file containing all user data

Uses Spring ACL for object-level enforcement; backed by ValkyrAclService.grantPermission(). Access is granted automatically when an OrderFulfillmentTask completes successfully.

revokedReason.description: Reason for revocation (e.g., refund, chargeback, policy violation).

OrderFulfillmentTask.description: Represents a fulfillment action on a SalesOrder or LineItem. Used by ValkyrAI workflows to track digital delivery, invoice generation, and post-order actions.
